title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Curefit - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Curefit - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Curefit invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Backend Developer at our Coimbatore location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Curefit:
Curefit is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Curefit!
